identifying_variation: cross-country variation in coded employment, collective, and social-security law
mechanism_travels: legal coding clarifies formal institutional differences
estimate_travels: no single effect size transports without enforcement data
diagnostic_next_step: Add enforcement, coverage, and informality measures before making welfare claims.

identifying_variation: differential exposure to abolition of cross-border worker restrictions
